title: keraudrenia hookeriana
intro: Keraudrenia hookeriana is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Madagascar, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Keraudrenia hookeriana include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Keraudrenia hookeriana can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can be used to make a poultice or salve to apply topically.
